faqs.question: Which courses are offered at Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences?
faqs.answer: Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences offers only one course of BNYS (Bachelor of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences). The duration of this course is 5.5 years. The programme is offered in affiliation with The Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R Medical University, Chennai.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences?
faqs.answer: Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences admission is based on merit scores. No entrance exam is required to secure a seat at the college. The minimum eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. The admission process also involves counselling and an interview round. Interested candidates can visit the official website to fill out the application form.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission is valid for admission to Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences. Students can apply directly on the college's official website based on their past academic merit of Class 12.

faqs.question: Are scholarships available in Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences?
faqs.answer: Yes, scholarships are available at Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences. The college offers scholarships for students from backward classes, most backward classes as well as for SC/ST students. In addition to this, the college also offers scholarships based on merit, especially to the students with high scores in Class 12.

college_info.intro: Sree Ramakrishna Medical College of Naturopathy and Yogic Sciences offers one course, namely BNYS in full-time mode. This popular programme is offered for the duration of 5.5 years at the UG level. The BNYS degree can be pursued in various specialisations, including Natural Medicine, Nutrition, Acupuncture, and Acupressure, among other therapies. BNYS is offered in affiliation with the Tamil Nadu Dr MGR Medical University, Guindy, Chennai. reviews_list.review_title: Government Medical College, Chittorgarh, is a good college.

review_content.Infrastructure: This is our first batch, so the food is good. The college is under construction, but we are managing.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are good because they are from RNT Medical College. The curriculum is new as per NMC rules. This course is extremely difficult, and it is difficult to understand everything in the syllabus. This is an MBBS undergraduate course. We have mixed feelings about this course because we have to study a lot, with a lot of books and practicals.
review_content.Other: I chose this course after clearing NEET UG exam and counselling. This is our first batch. There are 100 students. Batchmates are good. The college is 4 kilometres away from town. We are dissatisfied because we can't get tea, coffee, and cold drinks from outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely college is good because of placement offers and faculty.

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% were placed in our course. The highest package offered 4 LPA the lowest package is 2 LPA and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting company is Zomato. About 70-80% got internships in different companies. Top roles are offered in many non-tech companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of labs, classroom, library are so good Wi-Fi speed is good but in the library, there is some shortage of book otherwise facilities are experienced and good. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. Medical facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to enjoy college life then it is not a good college.

review_content.Placements: Not a single company has come to our college for placements because of covid. All the people were tensed. If you want to be placed at a company, you have to go there by yourself and hand over your resume. It was hectic for some children. Overall, I will say poor experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good in our college. They provided all the labs with good computers. Open Wi-Fi is given to the students but it didn't work 20% of the time. Labs are good. ASUS ROG computers are placed. I will say the infrastructure is average. But I didn't like the library.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Gujrawala Guru Nanak Khalsa College.

review_content.Placements: Placements for the computer background and commerce background are good and many people got placed in our college. We had different placement cells for different departments. During the placement, lectures guide us to crack the interview. The college placement is very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure might be old in some classes but now, there are being replaced with new ones. It is too good. Our college sports department provides NCC and NSS training too. Our college also provides a free Wi-Fi facility too. Physics lab and computer labs are well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It's an average college. With average infrastructure and good faculty.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing Bachelor of Science in non-medical and here are no placements for my course. So here are no highest and lowest placements. Also no top recruiting companies and also here no internships are offered that's why I only gave one star to my college in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Here are no hostel and college infrastructure is of average level. We have Wi-Fi, good labs, average classrooms and a fine library. And about college mess, it's just disgusting and also we don't have any playground. I think, it's a huge drawback of college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college and is value for money for B.Sc., pharmacy and PGDCA.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not provided by our college, but they provide proper guidance to all students for their future. All the teachers are highly talented and have good knowledge about their subjects. Although no placements are provided in our college, many students are placed in MNCs after completing their degrees and qualifying interviews on their own.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides paid Wi-Fi facilities included in the annual fee. They have highly developed computer labs. But Physics labs are not well maintained, and the equipment is old and damaged. Two canteens are available on the campus. No ground is present for sports. But a gym is available for NCC students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has ultimate goal to make the students employable.

review_content.Placements: Our college has been interacting and collaberating with good experienced companies to conduct campus drives. Almost 80% of students for every is being placed in expected companies with good annual package. The lowest package is for B.A. and the highest is for pharmacy. Students who gained above 85 % are given internship in my college. According to my course they offer me a job of a professor / teacher in any of the government college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure I have seen and experienced. All the basic facilities for all the students were provided by college management. Also the other advanced facilities like classrooms with smart boards, electricity, internet availability. College environment and surroundings are well maintained. Pleasant atmosphere for mental health and concentration.

review_summary.college_name: Gujranwala Guru Nanak Khalsa College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely college is good because of placement offers and faculty.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% were placed in our course. The highest package offered 4 LPA the lowest package is 2 LPA and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting company is Zomato. About 70-80% got internships in different companies. Top roles are offered in many non-tech companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of labs, classroom, library are so good Wi-Fi speed is good but in the library, there is some shortage of book otherwise facilities are experienced and good. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If you want to enjoy college life then it is not a good college.

content.Placements: Not a single company has come to our college for placements because of covid. All the people were tensed. If you want to be placed at a company, you have to go there by yourself and hand over your resume. It was hectic for some children. Overall, I will say poor experience.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good in our college. They provided all the labs with good computers. Open Wi-Fi is given to the students but it didn't work 20% of the time. Labs are good. ASUS ROG computers are placed. I will say the infrastructure is average. But I didn't like the library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Gujrawala Guru Nanak Khalsa College.

content.Placements: Placements for the computer background and commerce background are good and many people got placed in our college. We had different placement cells for different departments. During the placement, lectures guide us to crack the interview. The college placement is very good.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure might be old in some classes but now, there are being replaced with new ones. It is too good. Our college sports department provides NCC and NSS training too. Our college also provides a free Wi-Fi facility too. Physics lab and computer labs are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It's an average college. With average infrastructure and good faculty.

content.Placements: I am pursuing Bachelor of Science in non-medical and here are no placements for my course. So here are no highest and lowest placements. Also no top recruiting companies and also here no internships are offered that's why I only gave one star to my college in placements.
content.Infrastructure: Here are no hostel and college infrastructure is of average level. We have Wi-Fi, good labs, average classrooms and a fine library. And about college mess, it's just disgusting and also we don't have any playground. I think, it's a huge drawback of college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college and is value for money for B.Sc., pharmacy and PGDCA.

content.Placements: The placements are not provided by our college, but they provide proper guidance to all students for their future. All the teachers are highly talented and have good knowledge about their subjects. Although no placements are provided in our college, many students are placed in MNCs after completing their degrees and qualifying interviews on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides paid Wi-Fi facilities included in the annual fee. They have highly developed computer labs. But Physics labs are not well maintained, and the equipment is old and damaged. Two canteens are available on the campus. No ground is present for sports. But a gym is available for NCC students.

But Physics labs are not well maintained, and the equipment is old and damaged. Two canteens are available on the campus. No ground is present for sports. But a gym is available for NCC students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has ultimate goal to make the students employable.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure I have seen and experienced. All the basic facilities for all the students were provided by college management. Also the other advanced facilities like classrooms with smart boards, electricity, internet availability. College environment and surroundings are well maintained. Pleasant atmosphere for mental health and concentration.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with all the faculty, placement opportunities are amazing during2021 .
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are clean and properly maintained. Wi-Fi facility is provided in all the college rooms and in hostel rooms also. Food was very tasty and always serve fresh food. Separate games faculty is also their to encourage the students in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is above average. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Wi-Fi speed is very good and we also have solar power. Practical labs are good and all types of equipment are in good condition. Computer labs are also equipped with the latest hardware and software. Classrooms are also well lit and ventilated with proper sitting arrangements. Library is the best part of the college. There are all types of books available, and a good collection of magazines is also there.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied. There are no placements. There are good maths teachers, but others are not good.
reviews.review_text: There are two canteens among which one is good, but the other one is of poor quality. You will also get a Wi-Fi facility in our college. There are two labs, i.e., physics and chemistry. There is a conference hall where all functions are organised. Overall, the infrastructure is very poor, and our college should improve it. You can join NCC and other additional courses. Very less curricular activities are conducted here. I am the CR of the B.Sc.

reviews.review_heading: Khalsa College is the best college in Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are well maintained here, and two of them are newly built and have basic facilities. But they do not provide an internet facility. There is parking for bikes in every hostel, but our college doesn't provide parking for any student for cars in the hostel. Types of hostel rooms provided here vary from dormitory to single room. The food served in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with the best placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is excellent, and there are air-conditioners. Facilities are amazing, like drinking water, clean classrooms and a well-maintained library. The canteen is also amazing, and tasty and hygienic food is provided to everyone in the college. There is an excellent medical center.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in Ludhiana.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in my college, such as Wi-Fi, chemistry lab, physics lab, etc. Our library was huge and beautiful. There are two canteens, four parks, a sports complex and a gym are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the good infrastructure and faculty members but placements provided are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There is a Gurudwara inside the college, and it is very beautiful. The college has three well-maintained gardens. The two canteens on the campus are good. The food served in the canteen is hygienic and at a low price. Overall, it is a good experience.

reviews.review_heading: My college has a good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In my college infrastructure and facilities are very good. The college has very big classrooms and one very big library and in this library, all types of books are available for all students free of cost. In this college medical facilities are always available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is huge, and it is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All classrooms are huge. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, and canteen facilities are available in our college. There are two canteens in our college, and quality food is served, and it is tasty. It is available at very low prices.

reviews_list.review_title: Prime college of pharmacy- Best college to pass the course easily.

review_content.Placements: About 65-70% of students are getting placement after this course. The lowest average package is 8000rs per month and the highest is 23000rs per month as a fresher. The top companies are Appollo pharma, Life pharma, Dr Reddy's etc. Almost 90% of students got internship and mainly worked in multispeciality hospital and chain pharmacies. The roles offered are Medical rep, Drug inspector, pharmacist, sales manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a huge library with plenty of books to study each and every subject available. Each class has projector for helping in studies. The college has a playground, mess, auditorium. Hostel facilities are little bit lower. The food quality is just okay and sometimes bad. Sports is conducted each year and many games are played in college ground. Medical facilities are available at all time.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Prime College Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: In our course, there are 48 students in our class. There are better professors who teach you with easy examples that you can understand every subject easily. In our college, the highest salary package offered was 20 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was Rs. 60,000 per annum. In our course, many students apply for different companies like Yazaki, etc. Many companies may visit here for our course in future.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our department, there are good Wi-Fi facilities, and it is easy to download documents. It is easy to watch lectures. The classrooms are good with air-conditioning facilities and a good environment. The library is peaceful and good to learn and read books. Medical and canteen facilities are good in our college. The best food is available. Good indoor games like carrom and chess are available.

individual_reviews.title: Very good and neat college. Satisfied with the college.

In our course, many students apply for different companies like Yazaki, etc. Many companies may visit here for our course in future.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, there are good Wi-Fi facilities, and it is easy to download documents. It is easy to watch lectures. The classrooms are good with air-conditioning facilities and a good environment. The library is peaceful and good to learn and read books. Medical and canteen facilities are good in our college. The best food is available. Good indoor games like carrom and chess are available.

paragraphs: Prime College Pharmacy admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied with faculty members of this college.

review_content.Placements: It was a medical college, so most of the students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered ranges between 2 LPA - 2.5 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 45,000 per month. The average salary offered ranges between Rs 60,000 per month - Rs 70,000 per month. Top recruiting companies visited our college for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good. Our campus was not Wi-Fi enabled. All facilities were provided in this college. There was a decent library in this college. Laboratory was also available on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Please take action on the government ayurvedic college for the ruined building for safety reasons.

review_content.Placements: 35% of passed students were placed .  In my course, the highest package is INR 200000, the lowest is INR 20000, and the average package is INR 49999. The Himalaya Company, which makes cosmetics, is the top recruiting company. 99% get placed in government PHCs, CHC centres, in pharmacies, and also as a professor, principal, or doctor in many hospitals and as a medical officer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole building we are studying is on the verge of falling down; it could happen at any time because it has major cracks and breaks in its walls and ceilings. The government is doing nothing for this old building. The hostel facility isn't available as it is completely ruined, and the government hasn't taken any action against any of the above.

reviews_list.review_title: We are studying in a new college building.

review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi we have labs in our college and also classroom for all year classes and we also have library in our college. We don't have boys hostel in our college but we have girls hostel in our college they provide only residence not mess in the hostel.

description: Dr. BalabhaiÂ Nanavati Hospital NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 216 and 3383, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Dr. BalabhaiÂ Nanavati Hospital DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 216 and 3383 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 216, DNB in Medical Oncology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Critical Care Medicine with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

individual_reviews.title: My journey through UG to PG courses.

content.Placements: At least a student has to pass ISC with 75% marks in biology and overall at least 55% marks to get into Vinoba Bhave University. The highest package ranges from Rs, 90,000 to 1.2 lakhs per month. Companies like FSSAI and some local private centers give job opportunities. Internships for all students are not based on the percentage of students. Actually, it is mandatory for all. In this course, the top role offered is a dietician.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are some of the most attractive and best things that this college gives to students as there are a lot of facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, classroom environment, and library are very good. Especially, there is a library for all departments and not for only students of the college, but also for guests. Facilities of the hostel depend upon the quality of food and medical facilities are overall good.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG Counselling 2025 Round 1 final seat allotment results have been published for Om Group of Colleges admission to MBBS and BDS courses. Candidates allotted seats in this round are required to report to their respective institutes on or before Aug 18, 2025.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Om Group of Colleges:

table.details: NCISM, AICTE, NCTE, PCI, INC, MHRD GOI & State Government of Uttarakhand

college_info.intro:
Shree Om University Roorkee has two popular programmes: MBA and BAMS. MBA is available in various specialisations such as Marketing, Human Resources, and Finance. The core subjects aim at developing the knowledge and required skills in the fundamental Management discipline with specialisations in the functional areas. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, or can go for various other job profiles.
Shree Om University BAMS is a graduate degree programme in the Ayurvedic system. This degree is largely awarded after the completion of a five-and-a-half-year degree programme containing four and half years of academic sessions and one year of internship with live practicals. Overall, BAMS and MBA are the top courses offered at Shree Om University.
Below mentioned are some of the Shree Om University courses and their respective eligibility and Shree Om University fees:

placements.overview:
Shree Om University has a dedicated placement support team that oversees and facilitates all placement-related activities. The university boasts a strong track record of securing excellent job opportunities for its students. In addition, students are offered internships that provide valuable hands-on industry experience.
To prepare students for the job market, the university conducts various pre-placement activities, including training in communication and writing skills, corporate guest lectures, industry visits, mock tests, and reasoning classes.
As per the official website, companies like Apollo Hospital, Kotak Mutual Fund, and Shivansh Solution have recently participated in the Shree Om University placements, offering salary packages of INR 8 LPA, INR 7 LPA, and INR 5 LPA, respectively.

Go through the section below to learn more about the Shree Om University, Roorkee's admission process for 2025:
Step 1: Shree Om University, Roorkee Application Process 2025

Candidates looking for admission to any courses at Shree Om University, Roorkee, must fill out the admission form online and offline by visiting the official website of Shree Om University, Roorkee, to apply for admission.
Step 2: Shree Om University, Roorkee Selection Round

Admission to the courses is both merit-based and entrance-based. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to some courses, such as BAMS, MBA, BPharma and others. Further, for other courses, Shree Om University, Roorkee, offers merit-based admission.

STEP 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee SubmissionFor final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official website. After candidates are shortlisted based on their merits, they are required to pay the Shree Om University, Roorkee, fee to secure their seats.

paragraphs: Shree Om University has a dedicated placement support team that facilitates all types of placement-related activities. It has a track record of providing excellent placements to its students. Other than this, internships are provided to students that help them to gain real-time experience.

college_info.college_name: Rohilkhand Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital, Bareilly International University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Lacks growth and support.

review_content.Placements: As ours is the first batch of the college, placement opportunities are still in the developing stage. Clinical exposure and structured placement cells are limited, but efforts are being made to build future opportunities for students. Clinical is almost nil.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is basic with limited facilities. Classrooms and labs serve the purpose, but need improvement. Hostel and sports facilities are not very well developed, yet the campus provides a manageable learning environment. They don't even share PPT.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college offers a supportive environment with passionate faculty .

review_content.Placements: As my college is new, placements have not yet been done, and in medical college, there is no direct placement offered by any company. In this course, we get a doctor's degree in Ayurvedic medicine. The percentage of students who get internships is approximately 100%; it all depends on the student's results.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very limited, with a lack of sports grounds or parks. Classes are good; labs are also fully equipped. There is no Wi-Fi for the students, but the classrooms are a good size. The food quality is good and is cooked in a local mess, which is run by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: No batch has passed yet, so there is no idea about placements. The infrastructure is not very good,

review_content.Placements: The package offered is 3.6 LPA. Patanjali, Sri Sri, and other renowned companies, such as Dabur, are really famous. Roles include medical officer, consultant doctor, and the option to open your own clinic. In the non-clinical field, you may go for teaching. Apart from that, you can see if you want a decent BAMS college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Theatre, classroom, library, and hospital are available. Mess food is decent, and the water is good as well. The beds and infrastructure are just okay, but at times, the walls get fungus and leakage. However, it's not that bad overall.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college doesn't provide good placements.

review_content.Placements: We didn't say clearly because no batch has qualified yet. Studying in an Ayurvedic medical college is often a dream for many students who wish to pursue a career in traditional healing.
review_content.Infrastructure: However, the reality in some institutions is quite different from the expectations. In my college, the lack of basic facilities has created a big challenge for both learning and personal growth. Firstly, there is no sports ground available for students. Sports and physical activities are not just for enjoyment but are essential for maintaining physical and mental health. Ayurveda itself emphasizes the balance of body and mind.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied with the teaching. I can’t say much about the campus life.

review_content.Placements: The course offered here is the Bachelor of Ayurveda Medicine and Surgery. As it's a medical college, no direct placements are available. You are provided an internship in the college hospital itself. Only after that do you get your degree. The study is really nice here.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the labs are well-equipped. The hospital is well-equipped with emergency, ICU, and other facilities. The food quality in our hostel is quite nice. There is no Wi-Fi, though. Sports equipment is provided. The library is well-equipped. Medical facilities are on campus itself.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure was average, and it needs to improve in a lot of areas.

review_content.Placements: During our college times, few students got placed. When I had joined campus, it was the 3rd session of the campus. During our entire course, I had hardly heard about any company which had come for the placement process. So I couldn't say anything about the lowest and the highest salary packages offered in the course. The campus was newly established, so there was a lack of internship opportunity for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had a library with good quality books. There were two computer labs which were average, but these available resources were not sufficient. There was no Wi-Fi facility. There was a small cafeteria, but the quality was very poor. There were no services for boys like boys' hostel, but these services were only available for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bebe Nanki University College.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't have any placement cell although it is affiliated to Guru Nanak Dev University, Amritsar. At GNDU main campus, there are few placements in which few commerce undergraduate students get jobs in the management sector in various companies like TCS, Nestle, etc., with a salary package of less than 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is located on the main road in a village, so its surroundings are beautiful with nature. Our college building is quite good. Classrooms are clean and well-organised, but there is no air-conditioner during the summer. Our college has well-maintained computer labs and science labs. Our college doesn't have any hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure was average, and it needs to improve in a lot of areas.

content.Placements: During our college times, few students got placed. When I had joined campus, it was the 3rd session of the campus. During our entire course, I had hardly heard about any company which had come for the placement process. So I couldn't say anything about the lowest and the highest salary packages offered in the course. The campus was newly established, so there was a lack of internship opportunity for the students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had a library with good quality books. There were two computer labs which were average, but these available resources were not sufficient. There was no Wi-Fi facility. There was a small cafeteria, but the quality was very poor. There were no services for boys like boys' hostel, but these services were only available for girls.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Bebe Nanki University College.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't have any placement cell although it is affiliated to Guru Nanak Dev University, Amritsar. content.Infrastructure: Our college is located on the main road in a village, so its surroundings are beautiful with nature. Our college building is quite good. Classrooms are clean and well-organised, but there is no air-conditioner during the summer. Our college has well-maintained computer labs and science labs. Our college doesn't have any hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty and campus life were awesome in our college.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students start medical practice after completing the course, least prepared for PG examination. If degree-holding students practice in a private hospital, they offer a minimum of Rs. 40,000 per month, and if they start their clinic, it's based on their skills. Companies like Patanjali and other ayurvedic medicine manufacturing companies can hire you. 100 percent of students got internships either in the college or at any other hospital. The top role in our course is the AIA head.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, the library was the best, but other things, like classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi, were not satisfactory. Hostel food quality in the mess was good, but the canteen was not available. Medical facilities were 24/7 for sports. We had Table Tennis full facilities, rackets, and volleyball courts, which were very satisfying, and a ground for cricket and other games was also available.

college_info.college_name: Jigyasa University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Cutoff

highlights.summary: Jigyasa University (formerly known as Himgiri Zee University) admissions 2024 are open for various courses.

college_info.intro:
Jigyasa University popular programmes are BTech and BCom. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Chessian Consultants, ICICI Prudential Life Insurance, ShriRam Healthcare, Windlas Biotech Ltd, and others. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Developers, or can go for non-technical fields auch as Marketing, Sales, and others.
Himgiri Zee University Dehradun has experienced faculty members. The university has an industry-tailored curriculum and the university has a flexible & transparent academic system. Zee Himgiri University provides state-of-the-art facilities to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Jigyasa University and their respective eligibility and Jigyasa University fee structure:
For more information about Jigyasa University check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Himgiri Zee University provides internships to its students. Further, it is mandatory for every student to undertake internship and industrial training to complete their degree courses. The training and placement cell at HZU helps students in choosing and obtaining internships accordingly. Other than this, during the internship program, the assigned faculty mentor along-with the industry mentor evaluates the student’s progress as well.
faqs.question: Does Himgiri Zee University provide internships?

faqs.answer: A:    After pursuing BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at Jigyasa University, candidates can seek various job opportunities in the private as well as the government sector. The government job opportunities that are available to BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at the university are listed below:1. Banking2. PPO/DHO/AEO/ADO/CAO (PSC exams)3. Civil services exams IAS/PCS/IFS ( Agriculture as a subject)4. Seed Certification Inspectors5. Food Corporation of India6. Agriculture Development Projects7. Enterpreneursh
faqs.question: What are the government jobs that I can seek after pursuing BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    The career prospects for BA graduates of Jigyasa University majorly depend upon their chosen specialisation. The gradutes with a BA degree in Restaurant Management can build in career in the field of catering or hospitality. Candidates who have pursued a BA in Digital Tourism or  BA in Journalism and Mass Communication at Jigyasa University can get job related to the tourism sector, media industry, content writing, travel vlogging, etc. BA graduates of Jigyasa University are also elgible t
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing BA from Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    The semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University is INR 55,000. The total BPharma fee at Jigyasa University for four years (eight semesters) is INR 4.4 lakh.  Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess charges, etc.
faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates applying for admission to the desired course at Jigyasa University must pay an application fee of INR 1,000.
faqs.question: How much is the application fee at Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    BPharma fee at Jigyasa University includes multiple components including the tuition fees, hostel feel, registration fee, caution money, insurance charges, etc. Some of these components like the caution money, registration fee and hostel security deposit are payable once at the time of admission. The other fee components like the tuition fee are payable at the beginning of each semester. The tuition fee for BPharma at the university is INR 4.4 Lacs for four years. The semester-wise fee comes down to INR 55,000. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. They are subject to change and hence, are indicative.
faqs.question: What are the various components included in the fee structure of BPharma at Jigyasa University?

faqs.answer: A:    Jigyasa University provides merit-based scholarships to the students based on their merit in the qualifying exam. For BPharma students, the merit in Class 12 is considered as the criteria for the merit-based scholarships. These scholarships are offered only for the first year. To extend the scholarship further, the student must maintain a CGPA over 7 and a minimum attendance of 75% in every semester. The scholarships are provided in the form of fee waiver. reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to become successful, then take admission in our college.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a good placement team which always places more students in good companies. The average package of our college is 4 lacs/annum. Top recruiting companies for our course that come to our college include Zee Media, Dainik Jagran, Amar Ujala, etc. 100% of students got internships at Zee Media.
review_content.Infrastructure: All equipment used in our field is available. The campus is 55 acres with Wi-Fi. The labs are fully furnished, and the classrooms and washrooms are clean. All faculty members are helpful. The open cafeteria and good food are available in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely the best college because of good placements and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Maximum placements were placed in my college with an average of 95%, and the good thing is the average package is 5-6L per annum. The highest package is 3 cr per annum, and the lowest is 3L per annum. 100% of students got internships in all types of colleges and schools to which they are capable.
review_content.Infrastructure: All rooms have Wi-Fi connections. There is a separate auditorium hall for all other courses . The library is available anytime for any student. The hostel is so affordable with lots of facilities like Wi-Fi 4 times, food, and 24*7 medical facilities, a cafeteria with healthy food.

overview_faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fees for BCom at Jigyasa University?
overview_faqs.answer: The semester-wise fee for BCom at Jigyasa University is INR 30,000. The total BCom fee at Jigyasa University for three years (six semesters) is INR 1.8 lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc.

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fees for 3 years B.A course at Jigyasa University?
overview_faqs.answer: At Jigyasa University (formerly known as Himgiri Zee University), BA fee varies across the BA specialisations. The range of BA tuition fee at the university is INR 1.4 Lakh - and INR 2.1 Lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are registration fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jigyasa Univeristy a good option for pursuing BCom?
overview_faqs.answer: Jigyasa University, Dehradun offers BCom (Hons) with a total intake of 30 students. The university claims to have a well-designed curriculum for BCom. The curriculum comprises theory and practical application of concepts that prepare students to meet the challenges of the growing business world. The university also has a dedicated placement cell to assist students in finding suitable job opportunities. The maximum package record during the campus placements is INR 10 LPA across all the courses. Top companies including Bajaj, Wipro, ZEE Media, and others are known to have participated in the Jigyasa University placement drive. The university offers free Wi-Fi, hygienic classrooms and labs. There is a central library at the university. The hostel and mess facilities are also available the campus. The overall rating of Jigyasa University based on the student reviews on Shiksha.com is 4.1/5.

overview_faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University?
overview_faqs.answer: The semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University is INR 55,000. The total BPharma fee at Jigyasa University for four years (eight semesters) is INR 4.4 lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess charges, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Jigyasa University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Application - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty, placements, and infrastructures.

content.Placements: In Jigyasa University, 90% of BCA students get placed with packages ranging from 3 to 6 LPA. Around 90% of students secure internships in top firms like Hero Wired and Pisoft Informatics Limited. The best roles are offered, ensuring strong career prospects.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel offers great facilities, quality food, medical support, and sports options. The technical department includes 24x7 Wi-Fi, computer labs, more than 3 clean classrooms, and a vast library. It ensures a strong academic environment. The hostel has good freedom.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Application - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: We have a very big campus and good placements.

content.Placements: In my batch, there were 18 students. I have to be honest about the placement system; it's not exceptional, but the placement cell is doing its best to provide good opportunities for students. I would say about 50% of my batch has secured placements or internships, while the rest are pursuing their paths.
content.Infrastructure: Regarding infrastructure, our university is impressive. It features a large campus with a swimming pool and a spacious football field. There are two parking areas and a beautiful agricultural section. The campus spans approximately 40 acres of land, and it's particularly stunning in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you want to become successful, then take admission in our college.

content.Placements: Our college has a good placement team which always places more students in good companies. The average package of our college is 4 lacs/annum. Top recruiting companies for our course that come to our college include Zee Media, Dainik Jagran, Amar Ujala, etc. 100% of students got internships at Zee Media.
content.Infrastructure: All equipment used in our field is available. The campus is 55 acres with Wi-Fi. The labs are fully furnished, and the classrooms and washrooms are clean. All faculty members are helpful. The open cafeteria and good food are available in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college because of good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: Maximum placements were placed in my college with an average of 95%, and the good thing is the average package is 5-6L per annum. The highest package is 3 cr per annum, and the lowest is 3L per annum. 100% of students got internships in all types of colleges and schools to which they are capable.
content.Infrastructure: All rooms have Wi-Fi connections. There is a separate auditorium hall for all other courses . The library is available anytime for any student. The hostel is so affordable with lots of facilities like Wi-Fi 4 times, food, and 24*7 medical facilities, a cafeteria with healthy food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jigyasa university.

content.Placements: I am a student at Jigyasa University of the 2022 batch in B.Tech computer science engineering; there is almost 50 to 80 percent placement rate, but the average package is around 3 to 5 lacs depending on the student in computer science; mostly web development or data science job roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good in our university, as almost every single class has its own projectors and smart screens consisting of good quality tables and chairs. As for hostels, I am a day scholar, but I have visited hostels as well, and they are well maintained.

admission_overview.college_name: Jigyasa University Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: JU admission 2025is currently open for various courses. The university offers courses, such as BSc, BTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and diploma courses. To get admitted to JU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university offers more than 12 courses in various streams such as Pharmacy, Engineering, Management, etc. The application process atJigyasa Universityis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutJigyasa Universitycourse admission2025.
Jigyasa University admission 2025is merit-based. Jigyasa University offers 12 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Arts, Business & Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, etc.

Admission toJU coursesis based on merit. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularJU courses:
Class 12 with a minimum 45% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Maths (PCM)
Jigyasa University's admission process includes registration and application form evaluation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in JU:
1: Jigyasa University Application Process
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailedJigyasa University feestructure here.
2: Selection Rounds
Selection is merit based. Additionally, the eligibility criteria set by the university must be met.
3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the institute.  The university offers courses, such as BSc, BTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. To get admitted to JU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Interested candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

faqs.question: Is it hard to get admission at Jigyasa University for BPharma?
faqs.answer: Jigyasa University accepts direct admissions to the BPharma programme. There is no entrance exam forBPharma admission at Jigyasa University. The eligibility criteria require the applicants to have scored at least 50% in Class 12, with PCM/PCB subjects. The admission is subject to the availiability of seats. Hence, it is not very hard to get an admission atJigyasa University for BPharmaif the candidates fulfill the eligibility criteria and submit their applications timely.

placement_data.title: Jigyasa University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered during Jigyasa University placements in recent past was INR 10 LPA. The highest package was offered to an MBA student by a leading EdTech company during Jigyasa University placements. In addition, companies such as ICICI Prudential Life Insurance , JW Marriott and Saaransh Agro Solutions visited the campus during Jigyasa University placements 2023. Further, according to students’ reviews gathered from online sources, the average package offered during Jigyasa University iplacements in recent past stood at INR 3 LPA . Further, the placement rate recorded during Jigyasa University placements 2023 was almost 90%.

faqs.question: Does Himgiri Zee University provide internships?
faqs.answer: Yes, Himgiri Zee University provides internships to its students. Further, it is mandatory for every student to undertake internship and industrial training to complete their degree courses. The training and placement cell at HZU helps students in choosing and obtaining internships accordingly. Other than this, during the internship program, the assigned faculty mentor along-with the industry mentor evaluates the student’s progress as well.

faqs.question: What are the government jobs that I can seek after pursuing BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at Jigyasa University?
faqs.answer: After pursuing BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at Jigyasa University , candidates can seek various job opportunities in the private as well as the government sector. The government job opportunities that are available to BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at the university are listed below: 1. Banking 2. PPO/DHO/AEO/ADO/CAO (PSC exams) 3. Civil services exams IAS/PCS/IFS ( Agriculture as a subject) 4. Seed Certification Inspectors 5. Food Corporation of India 6. Agriculture Development Projects 7. Enterpreneurship Development Programmes 8. Agri Advisory and consultancy 9. Lab assistants, Field assistants and Technical Assistants in deptts. of Agriculture Universities

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Himgiri Zee University?
faqs.answer: Regarding Himgiri Zee University placements for 2023, the highest level of packages that were offered ranged from INR 10 LPA to INR 12 LPA. This is a significant recognition of the quality of talent leaving the university. These upscale packages demonstrate students' proficiency as well as the demand for and acknowledgment of the skills developed in the university classroom.In general, the average placement package was INR 3 LPA, even though the peak packages established a strong standard. The difference between the best and average packages highlights the range of opportunities that students came across while trying to find a place to study. It's representative of a range in which some received attractive offers, demonstrating the university's capacity to turn out graduates who can thrive in cutthroat professional environments, and others discovered opportunities that matched the more reasonable, albeit respectable, average package.

faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fees for BCom at Jigyasa University?
faqs.answer: The semester-wise fee for BCom at Jigyasa University is INR 30,000. The total BCom fee at Jigyasa University for three years (six semesters) is INR 1.8 lakh . Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc.

faqs.question: What is the semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University?
faqs.answer: The semester-wise fee for BPharma at Jigyasa University is INR 55,000. The total BPharma fee at Jigyasa University for four years (eight semesters) is INR 4.4 lakh . Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess charges, etc.

hostel.description: The University has made the provision of separate AC / Non AC hostels for boys and girls. The students are provided with basic amenities like a cot, study table, chair, bedside table and a cupboard in their respective rooms. Laundry facility is available on payment basis.

library.description: The Library has state - of the - art information systems and provides access to an extensive range of database, together with the traditional printed material. The library is stocked with more than 30,000 books, 4000 titles and a number of journals and reports that cover all subjects. Although the primary mission of the library is to support the curricular and research needs of the students, the library also provides material and reference assistance for the faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, placements, and infrastructures.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel offers great facilities, quality food, medical support, and sports options. The technical department includes 24x7 Wi-Fi, computer labs, more than 3 clean classrooms, and a vast library. It ensures a strong academic environment. The hostel has good freedom.

reviews.review_heading: We have a very big campus and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Regarding infrastructure, our university is impressive. It features a large campus with a swimming pool and a spacious football field. There are two parking areas and a beautiful agricultural section. The campus spans approximately 40 acres of land, and it's particularly stunning in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to become successful, then take admission in our college.
reviews.review_text: All equipment used in our field is available. The campus is 55 acres with Wi-Fi. The labs are fully furnished, and the classrooms and washrooms are clean. All faculty members are helpful. The open cafeteria and good food are available in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best college because of good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All rooms have Wi-Fi connections. There is a separate auditorium hall for all other courses . The library is available anytime for any student. The hostel is so affordable with lots of facilities like Wi-Fi 4 times, food, and 24*7 medical facilities, a cafeteria with healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jigyasa university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good in our university, as almost every single class has its own projectors and smart screens consisting of good quality tables and chairs. As for hostels, I am a day scholar, but I have visited hostels as well, and they are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of college life is not up to mark.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like labs and libraries are good, and mess food is also up to par. Overall, the average sports facility is good for basketball and football, and their cricket ground is nothing but an empty field with long-grown grasses, so do not expect much.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking to get your B.Tech done in between 4 LPA - 5 LPA, go for it.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 labs, out of which, 2 have the latest 12th gen in them. When it comes to the infrastructure of this course, it has changed since 2023. The curriculum has changed and now focuses more on developing ideas instead of just remembering which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides all students with good placements in reputed companies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is very good. The library and classrooms are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college, and I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel facilities are good. The canteen facility is decent. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good campus in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the university. Hygienic labs and classrooms are available. The university has a central library. Hostel facilities are above-average. The food is good, and the prices are very less compared to outside restaurants. Sports are conducted by the university, and they are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Hotel facilities are good with hygienic and tasty food being served.
reviews.review_text: There infrastructure of our college is good. Indoor and outdoor games facilities are available for sports like basketball, volleyball, etc. All the courts are excellent and well-maintained but the cricket ground looks like it is a field of agriculture department. Hotel facilities are good with hygienic and tasty food being served. Classrooms are well maintained with Wi-Fi available for all the students. Library is one of the best place in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Placement cell is average for agriculture students in our college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life was quite good in the college. Free Wi-Fi service was provided with good connectivity. Hostel food was also good including fruits, milk, tea, snacks, sweet dishes, etc. The medical facility was also decent. A doctor and a nurse were available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and medical facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are available. Food quality is not that good, but medical facilities are very good. Infrastructure is very good in our college, and canteen food is also very good. There are an open gym and a big ground for football and other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Well, its ones choice, no such recommendation.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Had cleaned classrooms and library. Study rooms also provided. No such knowledge of Hostels. Quality of canteen food was good. Apart from basic first aid they helped to get medical treatment from hospitals. Having good space for sports activities like cricket, volleyball etc. No space issue.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Himgiri Zee University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is a projector in our classroom. The hostel facility is good and separate rooms are available for the students. Mess serves the best food. The canteen and cafeteria serve food at an affordable price. Medical facilities are also available with a professional nurse.

college_info.college_name: Jigyasa University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The semester-wise fee for BCom at Jigyasa University is INR 30,000. The total BCom fee at Jigyasa University for three years (six semesters) is INR 1.8 lakh.  Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. The other components included in the Jigyasa University fees are one-time fees, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc.
Yes, Jigyasa University provides scholarships to its students in the form of fee waiver. The students can apply for any one of the following scholarships at Jigyasa University:
An additional scholarship/fee concession of 10% is offered to those students who belong to Signiwala Village, Selequi and other villages near the university campus.
Candidates applying for admission to the desired course at Jigyasa University must pay an application fee of INR 1,000.

Students at HZU can take advantage of a number of opportunities to apply for scholarships based on their merit, place of residence, and family relationships. Candidates for the Merit Scholarship will receive a 100% tuition fee waiver if they receive at least 90% on the qualifying exam. With a 5% cap on total seats, this esteemed scholarship promotes academic excellence.The Domicile of Uttarakhand Scholarship offers a 30% tuition fee waiver to accepted students who achieve a remarkable 60% on the qualifying exam. This programme seeks to assist regional talent and advance residents of Uttarakhand's educational attainment.Moreover, brothers and sisters of current HZU students or alumni are eligible for a 25% tuition fee waiver through the Sibling Scholarship. This helps families connected to the university with their educational journey and builds a sense of community.Eligible students must make sure they meet the requirements during the admissions process in order to be eligible for these scholarships. Within its academic community, HZU seeks to uphold familial ties, encourage participation in the local community, and honour academic achievement.

HK College of Pharmacy courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 115 students. The fees at HK College of Pharmacy is INR 5,20,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research popular programmes are BSc and MBBS. The university encourages students to go for their professional and personal growth. Meenakshi Ammal Dental College and Hospital, MAHER is one among the two dental colleges present in South India to have consistently collaborated with CCI. overview_faqs.question: How costly is Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: The Tuition fee per student is Rs. 1.30 Lakhs per annum.The College has 85% general seats and 15% seats under management quota. The college is affilated to Tamil Nadu Dr. MGR Medical University for the 1st Year batch of MBBS. However 2nd Batch would receive degree from Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research.

overview_faqs.question: Is Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research has long been established and recognised as a premier educational institution for all of its stakeholders. It promotes students' well-being and provides them with an ideal platform for making significant future strides in areas of deep aspiration and passion. In the year 2019, it was ranked among the top 100 universities in India by the NIRF.Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research most distinguishing and eye-catching feature is its exceptionally well-led medical, dental, nursing, and allied health sciences programmes.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for UG courses has different fee structure at Meenakshi Academy of higher education and Research is MBBS- Rs22.5 Lakhs (1st Yr Fees )BBA -Rs 50,000 (1st Yr Fees)B.Sc- Rs 1.09 Lacs (1st Yr FeesM.Sc Rs 2 Lacs (Total amount)M.D Rs3.15 Lacs (1sr Yr Fees)These are the fees structure of UG COURSES AT MEENAKSHI ACADEMY HIGHER EDUCATION AND RESEARCH

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee of Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: The hostel fees at MAHER is Rs 30000/- per year for a student which means Rs 2500/- per month for a student. Which is pretty Cheap.

review_summary.college_name: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied.

content.Placements: Around 20%-40% get direct placements, as many pursue higher studies. In the lowest package, the college has offered course for us, so that students can study well without any financial pressure. Top recruiters are from Bangalore, Mumbai, etc. Europe is also part of the best option as well. Above 60% of students got internships in better institutions at Manashasthra Mind Care, Kilpauk, Child Mental Care Farm, and so on. Top roles include clinical psychology, counseling, medical and psychiatry, fieldwork, industrial psychology, criminology, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: We don't have any hostel facility. Facility and infrastructure development is motivating, and clear environment to boost up our energy. Our discipline and personality are first priority for students and second is environment should be open and clear.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I think I feel good because of facilities and helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: I'm studying 2nd-year psychology. So I have no placement now but other departments like 3rd-year students are attending many interviews with recommendations from the college. Many of them are also placed with good packages. So this information only I know about placements.
content.Infrastructure: The courses in the psychology department are absolutely interesting, thanks to the help of faculty members. However, classrooms, infrastructure, and college canteen need to be improved. Because the college is very small, sometimes canteen looks crowded. This is my side of the point.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure was in excellent and the placements are given by the college.

content.Placements: There is about 75% of students got placed from this course and fee is Rs. 25000 which is affordable compared to other colleges. They provide placements and internships to students who get 80%.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities was excellent and they provide labs classroom library and the canteen fruits or hygiene and everything in the college is awesome. They providing quality of sports canteen library, the quality of the Hostel was hygiene they support students to involve in sports .
content.Faculty: The teachers are very kind polite to help, and they are highly qualified and knowledgeable people. The semester exams make confident about the studies. The course curriculum is prevalent. It makes students industry ready and the semesters are easy. The college was awesome.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Corporate Secretaryship - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in this college, so give it a try.

content.Placements: I've enrolled for Bachelor of Commerce specialisation in Corporate Secretaryship, and there are 26 members in our class. The highest package is Rs. 15,000 pm and the lowest is Rs. 10,000 p.m. Everyone in our class got internship placement, and we've trained in December 2024. There are job placements available in this college. The last placement was conducted on December 2024. Students from other colleges have applied, and most of them have been placed in their first try. Companies such as CIEL, FORTE MANAGEMENT, TECH MAHINDRA, VERTEX SOLUTIONS, JUST DIAL, MONEY PLUS have come to our college for placements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well, if you came only for study, it is good.

content.Placements: In our college, students are selected according to their percentage, which has to be more than 75%. And our college has a link with the government hospital in Kanchipuram; it's helpful for practicing. Apollo and Chettinadu Hospital came for placements. You will definitely get selected in any of the two hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite good with AV aids and the drinking water facility is good, but the toilet facility may be a bit disappointing. Everything is okay, according to the infrastructure. You have to adjust to the toilets because they might disappoint. And the ventilation in the class is also bad.

admission_overview.college_name: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Application & Dates

admission_process.title: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research admission is open for all the courses. The university offers various UG, PG, and Diploma programmes specialised in Science, Commerce, and Business administration and others. The college conducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit entrance based. Applicants seeking admission to the university can apply online through the official website ofMeenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research. To know more about the Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research admission process along with course eligibility and selection criteria go through the below segments:

Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG, PG, and diploma courses is open. Candidates who fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to BDS, MBBS, MDS, MS, and other courses. Further, for some courses, the college offers direct admission. The table below lists courses offered at MAHER courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreMAHER courses

MAHER admission processis open. The university accepts various entrance exam scores such asNEET/NEET MDS/NEET PG/ NEET SS and others for admission toBDS, MBBS, MDS, MS and other courses. Further, for admission to other courses, the university offers merit-based admission. Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research admission is a multi-step process. Check below the step-by-stepMAHER admission process:
Step 1: MAHER Application Process 2025

The eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of MAHER. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed theentrance examformalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the University.
Step 2: MAHER Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit andentrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission toBDS, MBBS, MDS,MD, and others Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, candidates are required to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Is it difficult to get admission in Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research?
faqs.answer: No, admissions are not difficult for hardworking students. Candidates must know their MAHER University eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. Follow the application process for successful admission to various courses offered by Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research:Step 1:Students must first collect the information about this university.Step 2:Then go for the admission inquiry, if needed.Step 3:If admission office's assistance is not required, directly check the eligibility for a particular course.Step 4:Apply online by clicking on the admission notification.Step 5:Give the interview for admissions.Step 6:Complete the admission procedure for admission.

placement_report.college_name: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the overall NIRF report 2024 released by MAHER, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 4.2 LPA , INR 4.5 LPA and INR 7.6 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.4 LPA and INR 10.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, 22 companies offered job opportunities during the academic year 2021-22 selecting 697 students . The list of recruiters who participated in MAHER placements 2022 included Durus Consulting, Apollo Hospital Chennai, Peak Health Studio, and many others. The University has also released the NIRF report 2023. According to the report, the median package offered to UG students during 2022 MAHER placements was between INR 3.75 LPA and INR 8 LPA . For PG (2-year) and PG (3-year) courses, the median package stood at INR 2.40 LPA and INR 9.60 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: How are MBBS placements at Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research?
faqs.answer: The placements are legit good at Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research. About 70%-80% of students are placed every year. Placements are not that tough . If you have above average marks then also well and good you will fit in the college placement. Some of the recruiter of the college are Apollo Hospitals, Max, and Meenakshi itself aslo hiers the students.

nirf.description:
MAHER has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for MAHER indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Dental', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, MAHER fell 3 ranks to #16 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
