reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Faculty of Humanities and Science, MAHERReviewed on 23 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We don't have any hostel facility. Facility and infrastructure development is motivating, and clear environment to boost up our energy. Our discipline and personality are first priority for students and second is environment should be open and clear.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Faculty of Humanities and Science, MAHERReviewed on 23 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I think I feel good because of facilities and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The courses in the psychology department are absolutely interesting, thanks to the help of faculty members. However, classrooms, infrastructure, and college canteen need to be improved. Because the college is very small, sometimes canteen looks crowded. This is my side of the point.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Faculty of Humanities and Science, MAHERReviewed on 23 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure was in excellent and the placements are given by the college.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities was excellent and they provide labs classroom library and the canteen fruits or hygiene and everything in the college is awesome. They providing quality of sports canteen library, the quality of the Hostel was hygiene
they support students to involve in sports
.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Faculty of Humanities and Science, MAHERReviewed on 9 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Everything is good in this college, so give it a try.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The environment is also so good. There are enough classrooms, and they have 2 shifts. Timings - Shift 1 - 8 a.m. to 12:30 p.m. Shift 2 - 12:45 p.m. to 5:15 p.m. Canteen is available in this college, so no worries about that. There is a physiotherapy department on the ground floor. If you need anything related to a medical emergency, they'll take care of you. They'll provide you with medicine. There are sports available such as volleyball, football, bask...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Arulmigu Meenakshi College of Nursing, MAHERReviewed on 4 Dec 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Well, if you came only for study, it is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite good with AV aids and the drinking water facility is good, but the toilet facility may be a bit disappointing. Everything is okay, according to the infrastructure. You have to adjust to the toilets because they might disappoint. And the ventilation in the class is also bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Meenakshi Ammal Dental College and Hospital, MAHERReviewed on 9 May 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Meenakshi Ammal Dental College and Hospital, MAHER.
reviews.review_text: The lecture hall accommodates more than 100 students and has a theatrical pattern. The classroom is fully air-conditioned with a smartboard. It is bright with a good feeling of warmth. Meanwhile, the hostel and mess food are above average. Air-conditioned rooms are available. There are four hostels, 3 for girls and 1 for boys, 2 inside the campus and 2 outside the campus. Even though the campus is small, the facilities are not compromised. This helps in getting to know other batchmates and other...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHERReviewed on 6 Apr 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good for work-driven student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. There is no facility for Wi-Fi. But laboratories are well-equipped and maintained. The classroom and library are also up to the mark. There is a wide collection of books including foreign journals. The hostel facility is average. There are 3 students in a room with an attached washroom. The room size is decent. The quality of food is not good but adjustable. As I am from north India so it's very tough for students to consume regularly. Sports and games like cricket...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Meenakshi Ammal Dental College and Hospital, MAHERReviewed on 25 Feb 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It is a decent and an average college for the fee charges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. This campus settles in 1 acre. It has every availability with necessities. Hostel is fine but I'm not satisfied with the hostel food., It doesn't have a separate sports ground. There is just a basketball court available that too is used as a parking lot many times. But they do conduct games, sports, and activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Faculty of Humanities and Science, MAHERReviewed on 14 Jul 2021)
reviews.review_heading: The college needs to improve everything, and there is no proper canteen even.
reviews.review_text: There are no facilities available in our college. The quality of food was below average. There is no proper canteen. There are no sports and games. There is no trip for students. The college should arrange a yearly trip for students. The college needs to improve everything.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2017Offered by Faculty of Humanities and Science, MAHERReviewed on 5 Mar 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: There were good classrooms on campus, but there was no Wi-Fi. Students were strictly not allowed to use their mobile phones inside the campus. It had good lab facilities. The food served in the canteen was not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Meenakshi Medical College Hospital and Research Institute, MAHERReviewed on 4 Mar 2020)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with all the teaching and staff members during the study.
reviews.review_text: This college has a separate library which specialises in all the departments and all books including Indian and foreign author books are available. There is always enough time to read about our subject. Our college has a Wi-Fi connection, and classrooms are also digital. Hostel accommodation is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Faculty of Humanities and Science, MAHERReviewed on 26 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and best placements. Moreover, the staff is friendly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure, mess, canteen, and medical facilities are neat and available. Moreover, sports and games are also provided. Many scholarships, like first-generation graduates and students who studied in government schools, among others. Wi-Fi is available on every floor. Available facilities include a library, labs for each department, and extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Faculty of Occupational Therapy, MAHERReviewed on 15 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college to learn.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was big, but students had to learn a lot. Classrooms were fine. The food served was average, but sometimes it was good. The hostel was fine, and all sports were available. Every month inter-college matches were conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Meenakshi Medical College Hospital and Research Institute, MAHERReviewed on 19 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with MAHER University and I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms are the facilities available. All are available at the hostel. The facilities and the food available in the mess are good. The hostel is in a particular branch of the college, and the canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Meenakshi is an old college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility inside the campus, and the infrastructure is not good enough. Labs need to be maintained for the betterment of equipment. The quality of the facilities provided in the hostel is just below par. The food served is better sometimes. The library is good, but it needs more faculty members to help students.

college_info.college_name: Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Tuition fee per student is Rs. 1.30 Lakhs per annum.The College has 85% general seats and 15% seats under management quota. The college is affilated to Tamil Nadu Dr. MGR Medical University for the 1st Year batch of MBBS. However 2nd Batch would receive degree from Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research.
The fee for UG courses has different fee structure at Meenakshi Academy of higher education and Research is
MBBS- Rs22.5 Lakhs (1st Yr Fees )
BBA -Rs 50,000 (1st Yr Fees)
B.Sc- Rs 1.09 Lacs (1st Yr Fees
M.Sc Rs 2 Lacs (Total amount)
M.D Rs3.15 Lacs (1sr Yr Fees)
These are the fees structure of UG COURSES AT MEENAKSHI ACADEMY HIGHER EDUCATION AND RESEARCH
Meenakshi Academy offers many Scholarships for MBBS like Private and Goverment too.
Some of them are:- 1.Student who have scored an aggregrated of 60% and above in the previous academic year examiniations.
2.Candidates who are to become the first graduate in the family.
3.Children of single parent with an income less then Rd. 1,00,000/- per year.
4.SC/ST students who have 60% or more marks in the qualifying examination irrespective of Boards.
5.Childern of Ex-servicemen of Defence force in any carde.
6.Student who have any certifications in National/intercollegiate/State/International Level/Extra-cirricular events (of any event or competion) in previous academics years.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students who were studied in my college can get jobs in government hospitals, primary health care centres or urban health care centers or medical colleges or any private health care facilities. reviews_list.review_title: it's really good and best infrastructure and facilities available here.

review_content.Placements: Here, placement is very good, and my college NMCRC Visnagar has its own hospital, so the placement is very good. All facilities are available in my college, hospital, campus, and hostel. Therefore, I recommend all medicos to get admission to my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college and hostel is very good. Many facilities are very good, like high-speed Wi-Fi, an air-conditioned reading room, a library, subject-specific labs, computer classrooms, lecture halls, and well-equipped hostel rooms. The campus has many sports areas like a cricket ground, volleyball court, football ground, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with its faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There are 150 students in one batch, and it is our first batch so the average package is provided after students complete MBBS. There are no higher, lower, or average packages because it is the first batch. In this college, no students get internships because it is the first batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi is available and the classrooms are very vast with an air-conditioner hall, and bench facility is also good. It provides a library with the best books and an air-conditioner is available in the hall. I would like to rate the hostel facility as 3-star. The mess is also good with healthy food, and it provides food four times a day, and other activities are also available.

description: Nootan Medical College and Research Centre cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Nootan Medical College and Research Centre NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the MBBS course. The institute offers admission to the MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Nootan Medical College and Research Centre 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for MBBS admission was 121783. For more informa

As per the Nootan Medical College and Research Centre MBBS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 121783 for the General HS category students. The cutoff for the same course was 95670 in 2023 and 233047 in 2022 for admission.
